prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Coventry Climax FPF 2.5L inline-4 (engine code: FPF 2.5)** with a **Titanium connecting rod set from Arrow Precision** and **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 compression ratio)** for high-RPM endurance racing. Pair with a **Weber 58 DCOE carburetor setup** featuring **velocity stacks from Jenvey Dynamics** and a **custom 4-into-1 stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering** for optimized scavenging.

Chassis reinforcement with a **T45 steel roll cage by Safety Devices**, integrated with **polyurethane bushings from SuperPro** at all suspension mounting points. Suspension overhaul includes **Bilstein B16 coilovers (custom valved for the T51’s leaf spring rear end)** and **Eibach Pro-Kit springs** to lower ride height by 30mm while maintaining compliance. Front suspension upgraded with **Rose-jointed upper and lower control arms from H&R** for precise camber and caster adjustments.

Braking system upgrade to **AP Racing CP5270 calipers (4-piston, radial mount) with 280mm two-piece rotors (floating design by Disc Brakes Australia)** at the front, paired with **Ferodo DS2500 brake pads** for endurance racing. Rear brakes retain the original drum setup but are reinforced with **steel-lined brake shoes from Mintex** and a **brake bias valve by Tilton Engineering** for fine-tuned balance.
estetica: Full **aluminum body panel restoration by RS Panels**, including a **hand-beaten aluminum hood with a single central NACA duct** for FPF engine cooling. Rear fenders widened by **2 inches per side** to accommodate **15x8-inch magnesium Minilite wheels (offset: +15mm)** wrapped in **Avon CR6ZZ tires (185/55R15)** for vintage racing authenticity.

Aerodynamic package featuring a **custom front splitter by Kamei (fiberglass construction)** and a **rear diffuser by Historic Racing Developments**, both designed to work with the T51’s low-slung chassis. Side skirts replaced with **aluminum running boards (polished finish) by Brooklands Speed Shop** to reduce weight and improve airflow.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a **full carbon fiber dash panel by Tillett Racing Seats**, housing **Smiths gauges (rev counter, oil pressure, water temp)** in a **machined aluminum bezel**. Seating consists of a **Sparco Pro ADV seat (HANS-compatible)** mounted on a **custom aluminum seat rail by Sabelt**, paired with a **MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede grip)** and a **quick-release hub by NRG Innovations**.
